description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Generate documentation that builds fbgemm_gpu docs on push to main and deploys them to gh-pages. Use a linux.2xlarge job that checks out the repository with submodules, updates git submodules, sets up conda with Python 3.9, installs PyTorch and fbgemm_gpu, builds documentation with Doxygen, and deploys to gh-pages using JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action.
